headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on Mid-America Apartment, Lowers Price Target to $138
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Mid-America Apartment (NYSE:MAA) with a Sector Perform and lowers the price target from $140 to $138.
